passwordReset.subject: Reset your {{siteName}} password
passwordReset.heading: Reset your password
passwordReset.body: We got a request to reset the password on your {{siteName}} account. Choose a new one with the button below.
passwordReset.footnote: This link expires in 1 hour. If you didn't ask for this, you can ignore this email. Your password won't change.

verify.subject: Confirm your email for {{siteName}}
verify.heading: Confirm your email
verify.body: Confirm this email address to finish setting up your {{siteName}} account.

layout.unsubscribeLabeled: Don't want {{label}} emails? {{link}}. This won't affect your other emails.
layout.unsubscribeGeneric: Don't want these emails? {{link}}. This won't affect your other emails.
